docket_entries.description: REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 30, 2017. OPPOSING PARTY IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.7B AND PROVIDE COURTESY COPY OF OPPOSITION TO DEPARTMENT 501 NO LATER THAN OCTOBER 6, 2017 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: A. PASCUAL, NOT REPORTED (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2017 Continued To Jan-24-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Oct-31-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Patricia R. Rodriguez (626-888-5206) of The Rodriguez Law Group for Plaintiff/opposing party Arketha Munir via Court Call.
William E. Alsnauer Jr (714-918-7000) of Hall Huguenin LLP for Defendant/Moving party NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC via Court Call.

Hearing is held. Plaintiff ARGUES seeking C900; even though not a primary residence. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC's MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS is GRANTED without leave to amend. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Sep-28-2017 Continued To Oct-30-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC's MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS is Continued to October 30, 2017. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than October 6, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)
